result.preview:
"SQLite query execution error (DatabaseError): Execution failed on sql 'SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS sales_amount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON c.AccountId = o.AccountId
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= DATE '2022-06-25'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate < DATE '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;': near "'2022-06-25'": syntax error"

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS sales_amount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON c.AccountId = o.AccountId
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= DATE '2022-06-25'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate < DATE '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS sales_amount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
JOIN sales_pipeline.Contract c ON c.AccountId = o.AccountId
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= DATE '2022-06-25'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate < DATE '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS sales_amount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25'
  AND o.EffectiveDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS sales_amount
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25'
  AND o.EffectiveDate < '2022-11-26'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;
